chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Civil Transfer Appln.No.S-08 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA-476/2021 2. For orders on CMA-477/2021 3. For hearing of main case. 18.03.2021. Mr. Munawar Ali Jatoi, advocate for applicant. = It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the private respondent is having a political influence, which he is exercising over learned Ist Senior Civil Judge, Nawabshah. By contending so, he sought for transfer of suit of the applicant to any other Court of competent jurisdiction. 2. I have considered the above arguments and perused the record. 3. The private respondent might be having a political influence, but he may not be having any influence over the Presiding Officer of the Court. The apprehension with the applicant for unfair trial is unjustified. No suit could be ordered to be transferred from one to other Court on the basis of self procured grounds. 4. In view of above, the instant Civil Transfer Application being misconceived is dismissed in limini together with the listed applications. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
